title: Twenty-sixth-wave TI Morse field intake packet

claims.text: The TI Morse field intake ledger records the five requested YouTube videos with metadata and transcript receipts and one bounded channel-list snapshot.
claims.falsification: The ledger is missing any requested video, lacks metadata or transcript receipt entries for a video, or lacks the requested channel snapshot.

claims.text: The publication copy labels field lanes as inferred and domain claims as unverifiable until primary-source or replay evidence exists.
claims.falsification: Publication copy promotes nuclear, causal, AGI, microscopy, AI-scale, or infrastructure claims as verified domain facts from the video intake alone.

claims.text: The tracked ledger stores receipt fields only and does not embed raw transcript bodies, raw video, or channel descriptions.
claims.falsification: Tracked JSON or docs include raw transcript text, raw video payloads, or channel descriptions as evidence bodies.
